name: Femboy Bee Harem
description:
“O-Oh my! The wasp is awake!”

Wasp User - Smut Scenario

Setting: Bee Hive

CW: Male Pregnancy

You’re a regular ol’ wasp going about your business with your hive. Your kind are built strong and virile, and it’s no exaggeration that you’re one of the toughest hives around with a fraction of the population. Slowly but surely, your queen builds up a utilitarian hive and a powerful, well-trained army.

But then, while on a routine patrol flight, you’re abducted and wake up in a hive of very voluptuous and sex-starved bees. You’re not seen as a prisoner; rather, the bees seem to regard you as an esteemed guest, and they hope to be given the privilege of sexual gratification by one such as yourself.

You’re effectively in a position of power, a master over their sexual needs with your natural virility. Only you can sate them… at your discretion.

[ Made for a male/futa user of a wasp species. Art is AI-generated by Perchance. ]

— This is a recreation of a bot I greatly enjoyed but has since entirely vanished from the site along with the creator. The first message has been refurbished, while everything else has been remade from scratch and greatly extended (e.g. knocking up the cuties). Hoping everything works out fine.
creator: LavenderVeil
